question: Will CPI rise more than 0.9% in March 2026?
reasoning: The March 2026 CPI report was officially released today (April 10, 2026) showing CPI increased only 0.3% month-over-month, which is significantly below the 0.9% threshold required for YES resolution. Multiple sources confirm this official BLS data, making the market outcome definitively NO with 100% certainty.
key_factors: Official BLS March 2026 CPI report released showing 0.3% monthly increase
Market requires >0.9% increase for YES resolution
0.3% actual vs >0.9% required threshold creates clear NO outcome
Data is final and official from Bureau of Labor Statistics
risks: Potential data revision (though highly unlikely for such a significant change)
Misinterpretation of the resolution criteria (though criteria are clear)
